creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Pedro :)

For this an future issues, please set maintainer-approval to + on any attachments for ports you are maintainer of. This can be done by:

Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

If you can also confirm that this change passes QA (poudriere, portlint), I'd be happy to approve you to commit to the ports tree.

This will also need a VuXML entry created for it.

It also appears that their github repository has a tag for 2.0b6, which should be used in preference to a git hash.
